productDisplayName: Baggit Women Digital Taj Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 9 cm Crafted from eatherette, has a three-fold open style with a button closure Printed upper for style Five card holders, one id card holder, a key holder and two pockets on the left fold Two zippered compartments and a pocket on the centre fold and a pocket on the right fold A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
